articles.title: XRP Moon Time? Ripple Eyes Upper Hand In SEC Lawsuit As CEO Garlinghouse Sheds Light On Case Outcome
articles.description: Garlinghouse further emphasized that while the SEC put on a front of openness and direction, the findings were not limited to any token or blockchain and instead served as proof of the agency's tenacious pursuit of enforcement actions against the sector.

articles.title: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse Praises Singapore’s Crypto Approach As the Fintech Firm Acquires Payments License
articles.description: The chief executive of payments platform Ripple Labs is commending Singapore for its approach to crypto assets as the firm obtains approval to operate in the nation. In a new press release, Ripple announces that it has obtained an in-principle payments license from the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) which would allow it to offer […]

articles.title: PEPE Surges By 34% Amid General Market Recovery
articles.description: Meme season sensation Pepecoin (PEPE) has gained by 34.23% in the last day as the crypto market maintains its Bitcoin-fuelled recovery. According to data from CoinMarketCap, PEPE’s impressive price movement has allowed the token to emerge as the top gainer of the day, outperforming the likes of Conflux (CFX) and Stacks (STX) who have held the headlines in recent days. articles.title: Inside Paradigm’s plan to make Ethereum more resilient
articles.description: Paradigm is joining a crowded field with a new open-source node implementation for Ethereum. But its CTO doesn't view it as zero-sum.

articles.title: MicroStrategy becomes profitable on Bitcoin bet as BTC surges past $30k
articles.description: MicroStrategy‘s $4 billion Bitcoin (BTC) bet turned profitable on June 21 after the cryptocurrency’s value surpassed the firm’s average purchase price of $29,803 for the first time in almost two months, according to CryptoSlate’s data. According to a May 1 filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, MicroStrategy holds about 140,000 Bitcoin acquired at […] The post MicroStrategy becomes profitable on Bitcoin bet as BTC surges past $30k appeared first on CryptoSlate.

articles.title: Bitcoin Signals Major Momentum Shift, Why $50K Could Be Next
articles.description: Bitcoin is trading at $30,000 today, up more than $5,000 in around a week since retesting 25,000 support. More important than the psychological level itself is the fact the push above $30,000 has turned momentum on monthly price charts bullish for the first time since August 2021. articles.title: ‘The Great Accumulation’ of Bitcoin has begun, says Gemini’s Winklevoss
articles.description: With spot Bitcoin ETFs filings helping boost the price of Bitcoin, some suggest the “window to front-run institutional demand is closing.”

articles.title: Ripple Obtains In-Principle Approval for Major Payments Institution License in Singapore
articles.description: Authorities in Singapore have awarded 190 Major Payment licenses, and 11 of these have gone to Digital Payment Token companies.

articles.title: Ripple gets in-principle approval for Singapore digital payment license
articles.description: The Asia-Pacific arm of San Francisco-based technology firm Ripple Labs saidThursday it received in-principle approval to start offering digital payment services in Singapore.
